design_philosophy.description: Elegant, high-end property branding. Utilizes generous white space, large typographic contrast, and sophisticated warm neutrals to evoke an 'Old Money' and refined atmosphere.
anti_patterns: No Inter font for headings or body.
No generic 'Bootstrap' symmetric column layouts in marketing sections.
No heavy drop shadows on cards.

primary_font.usage: Headings (H1, H2, H3), large numbers, quotes
primary_font.styling: tracking-tight for large text, leading-none for hero headings. Use Light (300) or Regular (400) for massive headers to retain elegance.

secondary_font.usage: Body text, UI labels, buttons, navigation, admin dashboard
secondary_font.styling: Clean, highly legible sans-serif. Use uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-widest, text-xs) for overlines and structural labels.

colors.guidelines: Use pure white (#FFFFFF) for cards and modals. Use the warm off-white (--brand-bg) for the main body background. The primary color (--brand-primary) is a muted luxe gold/bronze for CTAs and highlights. Secondary is a deep charcoal/olive for contrast sections (e.g., dark footers or dark hero overlays).

marketing_pages.strategy: Asymmetric bento layouts (Mode A: The Tetris Grid). Break the grid intentionally. Mix large full-bleed imagery with elegant typography blocks.
marketing_pages.spacing: Generous. Use p-12, p-16, py-24 to let content breathe. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
marketing_pages.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay or max bg-black/40. If image is dark, use bg-black/30. Ensure high contrast for text (APCA standard).

admin_dashboard.strategy: Strict grid hierarchy (Mode B: The Control Room). Dense and compact spacing.
admin_dashboard.style: Sharp edges, flat surfaces, or very subtle rounded corners (max 8px border-radius). 1px subtle borders (border-border). Avoid heavy shadows.
admin_dashboard.spacing: Tight gaps (gap-4, gap-6), standard padding (p-4, p-6).

marketing.structure: Pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts, overlapping elements, pure CSS for complex grid spanning.
marketing.interactive: Shadcn components (Forms, Dialogs, Select, Inputs) BUT heavily customized to match the luxe branding. Strip Vercel-look defaults.
marketing.buttons: Sharp corners or very slight rounding (rounded-sm). Use uppercase text-xs tracking-widest for an editorial feel, or elegant normal casing. Hover state must lighten the bg or use an outline shift.
marketing.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism if overlapping hero (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-black/40 depending on contrast), or solid white header. Never purely transparent.

admin.structure: Shadcn components (Tables, Cards, Badges, Tabs, Dropdowns).
admin.charts: Shadcn charts or Recharts for unit status analytics.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: MANDATORY: Use `lenis` for smooth scrolling on marketing pages to provide a premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Subtle, slow fade-ins and slide-ups (using Framer Motion). No bouncy or frantic animations. Slow reveal matches the luxury tone.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images slightly scale up (scale-105) inside hidden overflow containers. Buttons gently shift colors. Always explicitly set hover text color.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='lead-form-submit').

media.image_strategy: High-resolution architectural and interior photography. Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile. Never use placeholder services like dummyimage.com.

hero_exterior.description: Contemporary modern architecture with glass facade - Use for main hero.
Unique modern building facade - Use for exterior gallery.

interiors.description: Modern living room - Use for Units/Floor-plans overview.
Spacious elegant apartment - Use for interior gallery.

amenities.description: Large indoor swimming pool - Use for Amenities section.
Luxury pool with lush trees - Alternative for Amenities.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the provided CSS variables into the global stylesheet (e.g., index.css) inside the :root block.
Update tailwind.config.js to map to these CSS variables.
Add 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' to the HTML document head via Google Fonts.
Ensure all marketing sections use <section> and pure Tailwind layouts with generous padding (e.g., py-24).
Integrate Shadcn UI components for the lead capture forms and admin dashboard.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling globally for the marketing site routes.
Strictly adhere to the data-testid rules for every interactive element.
